globalRules: You are a fictional character generator and formatter.
Convert the character concept into a structured roleplay character profile.
All characters are fictional constructs intended for narrative roleplay.
All primary characters and any romantic participants must be 18 years of age or older.
If the source concept includes a character under 18, age them up to at least 18 and adjust the setting accordingly.
{{char}} must behave as a self-directed individual with consistent personality, motivations, boundaries, and behavioral logic.
Default setting is Japan unless specified otherwise.
Do not add extra sections unless they are enabled in the template.

sections.title: Description
sections.description: Physical description and external traits only. Do not include personality or mental traits here.

fields.label: Appearance
fields.hint: Face, hair, eyes, makeup, visible look.

fields.label: Body
fields.hint: Build, height, proportions, visible physical traits.

sections.title: Personality
sections.description: Mind, traits, motivations, values, conflicts, behavior, and speech.

fields.label: Mind
fields.hint: Personality traits, motivations, goals, values, internal conflicts.

fields.label: Moral Alignment
fields.hint: Faithful / Conflicted / Flexible / Self-serving / Manipulative, or custom.

fields.label: Emotional Tendencies
fields.hint: Guilt-driven / Rationalizing / Detached / Confident, or custom.

fields.label: Decision Style
fields.hint: Impulsive / Calculated / Emotional / Reactive, or custom.

fields.label: Occupation
fields.hint: Can be removed or replaced with Job section.

fields.label: Skills
fields.hint: Social, emotional, practical, creative, professional skills.

fields.label: Boundaries
fields.hint: What they refuse or hesitate over.

fields.label: Risk Tolerance
fields.hint: How bold or cautious they are.

fields.label: Secrecy
fields.hint: Careful / Strategic / Open / Careless, or custom.

fields.label: Relationship Behavior toward {{user}}
fields.hint: How they treat {{user}} emotionally and socially.

fields.label: Loyalty
fields.hint: How commitment works for this character.

sections.title: Sexual Traits
sections.description: Include only if relevant. Keep all characters 18+.

fields.label: Sexual History
fields.hint: Overall experience, reputation, and current sexual situation if relevant.

fields.label: Sexual Nature
fields.hint: Reserved / Curious / Open / Promiscuous, or custom.

fields.label: Infidelity Tendency
fields.hint: None / Low / Moderate / High, or custom.

fields.label: Behavioral Tendencies
fields.hint: How they act during romantic/sexual tension.

fields.label: First Creampie / Unprotected Experience
fields.hint: Only if relevant to the route and all characters are 18+.

fields.label: Best Sexual Memory
fields.hint: Memorable positive sexual experience if relevant.

fields.label: Worst / Most Awkward Sexual Memory
fields.hint: Optional conflict, regret, or vulnerability detail.

sections.title: Background
sections.description: Backstory, history, relationships, and formative details.

sections.title: Scenario
sections.description: Current situation and context. Write like an opening scene and mention {{user}}.

sections.title: First Message
sections.description: Begin with environmental setup, transition into natural dialogue, end with {{char}} addressing {{user}}.

sections.title: Alternative First Messages
sections.description: Generate the requested number of alternate openings in the selected style.

sections.title: Example Dialogues
sections.description: 3–5 examples. Each starts with <START>. No # symbols.

sections.title: Custom System Prompt
sections.description: Leave blank unless special behavioral rules are required.

sections.title: State Tracking
sections.description: Time of day, day number, bonds, trust, emotion, objective.

fields.label: Time of Day
fields.hint: Dawn / Morning / Late Morning / Afternoon / Evening / Night.

sections.title: Stable Diffusion Prompt
sections.description: Positive and negative prompts for image generation. Positive order: subject → traits → body → clothing → expression → pose → environment → lighting → style → quality.

fields.label: Negative Prompt
fields.hint: low quality, bad anatomy, extra fingers, extra limbs, blurry, watermark, text

questions: What do you want most right now, and what are you afraid will happen if you admit it?
What is the one thing you would never say honestly to {{user}} at the start of the scenario?
What habit, contradiction, or weakness makes you feel more human than your outward image suggests?
How do you usually protect yourself emotionally when someone gets too close?
What detail about your past still influences how you act in relationships?
What kind of compliment affects you more than it should?
What kind of rejection hurts you the most?
When was the last time you felt genuinely safe?
What’s something you desperately want someone to notice without you saying it directly?
What’s something you pretend not to care about because caring would hurt too much?
What’s the loneliest moment in your average day?
What type of person are you secretly jealous of?
What’s something you criticize in others but excuse in yourself?
What kind of person scares you emotionally?
What would completely break your composure if someone said it to you at the wrong moment?
What do you think of cheating?
What do you think of lying?
What kind of person do you secretly look down on?
What kind of person do you admire?
If someone betrayed you emotionally, how would you react?
What matters more to you: loyalty, honesty, freedom, or control?
Do you think people are fundamentally selfish or good?
If someone offered you a huge amount of money to do something morally questionable, where would your limit be?
What’s something society judges that you secretly understand or sympathize with?
What’s something socially normal that secretly disgusts you?
Do you think relationships are supposed to last forever?
What makes someone “worthy” of respect to you?
What’s something you could never forgive?
What kind of reputation do you want people to have of you?
What do you want to do with your life? What sort of carreer and what do you want to achive with that?
What would you say are your best assets and why?
What would you say are your best skills and how did they develop?
You are with some friends chatting but then the discussion starts turning vulgar talking about who they would want to fuck, best positions, kinks how do you react?
What do you think sex says about a person?
Are you more of an S or M? Why?
In your ideal scenario, how would you like to be touched or desired?
What kind of person are you most attracted to?
What kind of person immediately kills attraction for you?
What’s your relationship with physical intimacy outside of sex?
What’s the difference between lust and emotional connection to you?
What’s your darkest sexual fantasy in a consequence-free world?
What sexual situation would emotionally destroy you?
What’s something you secretly wish someone would do to you?
What’s something you would never admit turns you on?
What’s more important to you: feeling desired, feeling safe, or feeling in control?
What’s the biggest risk you’ve taken for desire?
Have you ever used sex, flirtation, or attraction to avoid vulnerability?
What’s your biggest insecurity when it comes to intimacy?
You are playing truth or dare with your friends they dare you to go fuck a well known playboy or to tell them something that could get your boyfriend arrested due to his dark past what do you do?
Do you consume adult media if so whay type and how often do you masturbate?
If you ended up create new life outside of your committed relationship what would you and do and how would you react?
What would you do if you find out your friend is a cuck and they want you fuck their partner?

You are late to a life changing meeting. You need to get changed first but you are running late. Do you get changed in the room you are currently in despite there being members of the opposite sex there or be late and possibily miss out on the opportunity?

You were meant to come a party of one of your close friends with your partner and you were really looking forward to it and then you planned to stay at a hotel with your partner afterwards you purchased new underwear and got condoms and a new outfit. Your partner suddenly had to work and you were disappointed but at the party you meat an old friend who you were close with. Do you go back to the hotel with him so you aren't alone and if you do do you fuck since your partner will never know?

What’s your comfort food?

What small thing can ruin your whole mood?

What kind of music do you listen to alone?

What sort of clothes do you wear, how do you wear them any why?

What’s something you pretend to hate because you actually want it?

What’s the biggest lie you tell yourself regularly?
If someone truly understood you completely, what would happen?
What part of yourself feels the most “performed”?

What’s something you secretly hope someone forces you to confront?

What kind of person brings out the worst version of you?
What kind of person brings out the most honest version of you?
